titleEn: Health central to kiwifruit producer's marketing
contentHtml: New Zealand's Hayward kiwifruit season is well underway, with Michael Leach of NutriKiwi saying the fruit quality is excellent, which coincides with consumer demand being strong as exports into Australia ramp up. The Nutritious Kiwi Fruit Company (NutriKiwi) brings together green kiwifruit supply from…
